name: Company's Coming Cashew Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust according to package directions for a one-crust filled pie using a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a large bowl, beat together the brown sugar and margarine or butter until light and fluffy.
4. Add corn syrup and vanilla; beat at medium speed until smooth.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
6. Stir in chopped cashews.
7. Pour mixture into the crust-lined pan.
8. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes, or until the top of the pie is deep golden brown.
9. After 15 to 20 minutes of baking, cover the edge of the crust with strips of foil to prevent excessive browning.
